{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240130257793B2A43A4A0A93F827"}"},"total":1562},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400343187054592793","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"轻松文看着舒服   不装逼   不圣母"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723029308,"group_id":"7367910592499158078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1gzk9iCwPU5/JN6FZtG2VQJ1lIOYOFug80MSNZD4L/S","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877005&x-signature=F7rwZ9C6HX8CXHTnqUkNbe1L%2B0Q%3D","user_id":"4388875363949981","user_name":"沐辉的孔师兄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4388875363949981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1724651008,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367910592499158078","book_info":{"abstract":"【男频开头：得到灵泉空间，回家种田养狗。
    男频结尾：诸天万界万族，统统扫进垃圾堆】
乡野山村种田文，主角得到奇遇，自己摸索修炼，修仙休闲文，无系统，有空间，后期父子双男主，一千章左右换地图。
大都市打工的叶欢，意外得到一个灵泉空间，那还加什么班?朝八晚十的苦逼日子，过的够够的了！
回家种田，必须回家种田。
回到老家的叶欢，才知道自己留在城市错的有多离谱，他跑山，种菜，养狗和小白狼，甚至还有邻居大熊猫母子，惬意的享受着山里的舒适生活。
都说有钱农村是净土，叶欢也是这么想的，所以他收了爷爷交给他的宝贝，靠着卖菜，挖野参，过上了自己想要的，以前不敢想的美好生活。
不但如此，他还结交了各种猛兽伙伴，野狼，大老虎，甚至还有大蟒和金雕。
他保护家人，保护财源，手段也许黑了点，但是他不后悔。
对朋友他春风拂面，对敌人他又秋风扫落叶。
儿子叶昊，托老父亲叶欢的倒霉福气，替父应劫，穿越异世，和神农爷爷相依为命二十年后，神农回归，叶昊独自闯荡玄武大陆，最终，凭借老父亲的空间，脱凡成仙，胜利会师神农爷爷和家人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a9d2ccf1d578c9fa12cc27f8a04aeb91","author":"神级过客","author_id":"","book_id":"7367910592499158078","book_name":"悠然山村，开局熊猫赖上我","book_short_name":"仙缘叶家村","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c080","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7367910644126843454","read_count":"53474","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4738672"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"2269","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,空间,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2831fa003d98bc12646a332d4aca8241~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471025&x-signature=0Vw5EPlWv%2BaJ3TND6oRCthWdE5U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2931754490672553","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240130257793B2A43A4A0A93F827"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suf
